title: QuizPulse
description: Real-time quiz platform with OTP authentication, live leaderboards, scalable multi-user sessions.
overview: QuizPulse is a full-stack real-time quiz platform built for engaging multi-user quiz sessions. It includes OTP-based authentication, live leaderboard updates, and scalable deployment using Docker. The system focuses on responsiveness, performance, and smooth real-time interactions.

title: Dev Portfolio
description: A premium dark-themed developer portfolio with JSON architecture and Framer Motion effects.
overview: A fully responsive developer portfolio designed with a premium glassmorphism aesthetic. Built using reusable JSON-driven architecture, smooth Framer Motion animations, and a modular component structure to create a modern user experience.

title: Kubera
description: UPI-inspired micro-investment platform that automatically rounds transactions and invests spare change.
overview: Kubera is a mobile-first fintech platform inspired by modern payment systems like GPay and PhonePe. It simulates digital payments, calculates round-up spare change, stores investment pools, and automatically triggers investments when thresholds are reached. The platform includes payment simulation, dashboard analytics, investment management, card systems, and admin monitoring.
challenges: Managing spare pool and threshold-based investment workflows
learned: System design and fintech workflow architecture
